zh.lifeSummary: 當Margery Grapinel於大約1267年出生在英國賀特福爾雷德布時，她的父親Sir Henry Grapinel20歲，母親Margery19歲。她和Sir William Inge至少有2個兒子和1個女兒。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margery Grapinel于大约1267年出生在英国賀特福爾雷德布时，她的父亲Sir Henry Grapinel20岁，母亲Margery19岁。她和Sir William Inge至少有2个儿子和1个女儿。

nameMeanings.name: Margery
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual medieval vernacular form of   Margaret   (now also commonly spelled   Marjorie  ). This form of the name is preserved in the nursery rhyme ‘See-saw, Margery Daw’.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Margery Grapinel was born about 1267, in Redbourn, Hertfordshire, England, her father, Sir Henry Grapinel, was 20 and her mother, Margery, was 19. She had at least 2 sons and 1 daughter with Sir William Inge.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margery Grapinel est née environ 1267, à Redbourn, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Henry Grapinel, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Margery, avait 19 ans. Elle a eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille avec Sir William Inge.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margery Grapinel um 1267 in Redbourn, Hertfordshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Henry Grapinel 20 und ihre Mutter Margery 19. Sie hatte mit Sir William Inge mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margery Grapinel è nata il circa 1267 nel Redbourn, Hertfordshire, England, sua padre, Sir Henry Grapinel, aveva 20 anni e sua madre, Margery, aveva 19 anni. Lei avuto almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia con Sir William Inge.

ja.lifeSummary: Margery Grapinelが約1267年にイギリスハートフォードシュアイアレドボウルンで生まれた時，父Sir Henry Grapinelは20歳，母Margeryは19歳であった。彼女はSir William Ingeとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。

ko.lifeSummary: Margery Grapinel(이)가 대략 1267년 영국 허트퍼드실르 레드보우른에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Henry Grapinel(은)는 20세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margery(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 Sir William Inge(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margery Grapinel nasceu aproximadamente 1267, em Redbourn, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Henry Grapinel, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Margery, tinha 19 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha com Sir William Inge.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margery Grapinel родилась около 1267 г. в местности редбурн, хиртфордшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Henry Grapinel было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Margery, 19. У неё было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь от Sir William Inge.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margery Grapinel nació aproximadamente 1267, en Redbourn, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Henry Grapinel, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Margery, tenía 19 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija con Sir William Inge.
